The post-repoint lifecycle doc/help cleanup is now checked in and executed via `meta/docs/prompts/prompt-2026-03-21-pipeline-a-retirement-doc-cli-cleanup.md`; touched operator-facing surfaces no longer present `hepar` / `hep-autoresearch` as the default generic lifecycle entrypoint, while the then-unrepointed commands remained explicitly on the legacy surface. 2026-04-06 follow-up then retired duplicated public lifecycle verbs `status/pause/resume/approve` from the installable `hepar` / `hep-autoresearch` alias, leaving only the internal full parser for maintainer/eval paths plus the still-unrepointed workflow/support command set. A later 2026-04-06 follow-up then made `autoresearch run --workflow-id computation` a live native TS slice. 2026-04-07 follow-up then narrowed the installable public shell further by removing `doctor` and `bridge` from `hepar` / `hep-autoresearch` / `hep-autopilot`; those commands now remain only on the internal full parser for maintainer/eval/test paths. A later 2026-04-07 follow-up then also retired public `literature-gap` from the same installable shell while keeping the internal full parser path for maintainer/eval/test usage. A further 2026-04-07 follow-up then retired public `hepar run --workflow-id computation` from the installable shell while keeping the internal full parser computation path for maintainer/eval/test usage, so the remaining operator-facing Pipeline A public shell is now genuinely narrowed to residual non-computation `run` workflows and adjacent workflow/support commands rather than computation or launcher-backed literature entry. A later 2026-04-07 command/spec authority follow-up then made the remaining retirement surface machine-checkable across three exact seams: TS `autoresearch` top-level command inventory, installable `hepar` public-shell inventory, and exact `orch_*` spec truth. The next residual retirement sequence is now source-grounded as: (1) public residual non-computation `run` repoint/retirement, (2) `doctor` / `bridge` / `literature-gap` contract rebaseline to internal-only maintainer/eval truth, and (3) adjacent authoring/support cleanup for `run-card` / `method-design` plus package-local action docs. 2026-03-24 decision-gate alignment then also cut NEW-R10 because `NEW-05a-stage3` now establishes the live TS `idea-engine` `search.step` + post-search RPC baseline rather than a `search.step`-only surface. Remaining: NEW-R11 (P3).
